name: Toward a future that preserves benefits of neurotechnology for all
summary: PhD student Rachel Sava, winner of the Envisioning the Future of Computing Prize, explores transformative improvements and dystopian risks of neural technology.
description: PhD student Rachel Sava, winner of the Envisioning the Future of Computing Prize, explores transformative improvements and dystopian risks of neural technology.
author: Amanda Diehl | MIT Schwarzman College of Computing
